creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144308
combined

- update (fixes bug 191190)
- convert to new options syntax
- make sure PYTHON and FFMPEG are detected properly
- (conf) alias surround stuff to pcm.default
- (lib) split patches and refactor a bit
- (plugins) fix leftovers for PREFIX!=LOCALBASE
- (utils) rename XMLTO to MANPAGES
- (cosmetic) fix OPTIONS_SUB usage
